# `!fail`

**Category:** control

Unconditionally fail the task (and stop the play) with an optional message.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `msg` | string | no | Failure message; defaults to fail invoked. |

## Examples

```yaml
- !fail
  msg: Aborting: {{ reason }} not satisfied
```
